overall.description: First-person perspective gameplay footage of a character walking through a dark forest at night using a flashlight or torch. The environment features narrow dirt trails, rocky outcrops, dense trees, and scattered fallen logs, creating an atmospheric horror or survival game setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow forest trail with rock wall

events.description: path curves gently to the right along the rock face

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously along the narrow forest path, flashlight illuminating the rocky wall on the right

entered.detail: tall rocky cliff face running alongside the right side of the path
narrow winding dirt trail with scattered stones
dense overhead tree cover blocking the sky
grass and small plants lining the left side of the trail

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a narrow forest trail at night, bordered by a prominent rock wall on the right and dense undergrowth on the left. The camera moves forward along the winding dirt path, with the flashlight revealing texture details on the rock face and scattered stones underfoot.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest corridor with birch trees

events.description: rock wall ends and path opens into denser forest with more trees on both sides

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through the forest corridor, navigating the uneven terrain

entered.detail: white-barked trees visible in the mid-distance on the left

segments.scene_description: The rock wall falls away as the path continues deeper into the forest, now flanked by trees on both sides. The trail remains narrow and winding, with birch trees becoming visible among the darker foliage as the camera progresses through the dense woodland corridor.

events.description: path enters area with scattered fallen logs and timber debris
hand holding torch becomes visible in bottom left corner of frame

agents.ego_description: navigating through the cluttered forest floor with fallen logs, holding a torch that becomes visible in the final moments

entered.detail: large fallen tree trunks and timber scattered across the left side of the path
character's hand holding a wooden torch becomes visible in lower left corner

segments.scene_description: The forest opens slightly into a clearing area littered with fallen logs and timber debris. The path becomes less defined as the camera navigates around the obstacles. Near the end of the segment, the character's hand holding a wooden torch becomes visible, confirming the first-person game perspective.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a claustrophobic forest trail that gradually opens into a debris-strewn clearing. It begins by winding along a narrow dirt path pressed against a prominent rock wall, with a flashlight illuminating the rough stone textures and scattered pebbles underfoot. As the rock wall falls away, the camera pushes deeper into the woodland, where the corridor shifts to be flanked by dense foliage and pale birch trees. The scene then expands into a wider clearing littered with fallen logs and timber debris, causing the defined path to fade as the camera navigates around the obstacles. Finally, the perspective shifts slightly to reveal a hand holding a wooden torch, grounding the movement within the game environment.
